not_found.title: Lost?
not_found.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.

hero.headline: I build apps and ship them.
hero.description: I'm Mikołaj. I take ideas from zero to something people actually use. Shipped apps on iOS, Android, and web. Solvee got 25k+ downloads before I sold it. Always building something new.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Projects and milestones in chronological order.

omni_started.title: Omni
omni_started.description: Started working on Omni – the AI that knows you and your computer

platoic_started.title: Platoic
platoic_started.description: Started working on Platoic – personalized AI learning platform

subby_released.title: Subby
subby_released.description: Released a subscription manager app to track trials and subscriptions

solvee_launched.title: Solvee
solvee_launched.description: Launched an AI homework helper app on iOS and Android

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Tools for a better digital life.

omni.tagline: The AI that knows you and your computer.
omni.description: Find files by meaning, manage email & calendar, install apps, change settings — just ask.

platoic.description: Master any topic with a personalized AI curriculum that curates the web's best resources into your perfect learning path. Constant AI guidance for your curiosity.

solvee.description: I sold the app. It helped over 25k+ students solve problems instantly with detailed AI explanations. Available on iOS and Android.

subby.description: Never pay for an unwanted subscription again. Track trials, manage expenses, and save money effortlessly.

footer.description: Always excited to work on new projects and meet other builders.
